_README: THIS IS THE ONLY FILE YOU EDIT DURING THE TOURNAMENT. After editing, save and redeploy (or just refresh if running locally). Use the 3-letter team codes from teams.json (e.g. ESP, BRA, USA). See README.md for the full guide. A worked example with sample scores lives in results.sample.json.
_groupResults_help: Add one line per finished GROUP-STAGE match. home/away = team codes, hs/as = goals. Group, standings, group-winner bonus, and who advances are all computed automatically. Order does not matter.
_overrides_help: Leave these null in normal cases — the engine computes them. Only fill them to settle a tie decided by drawing of lots or fair-play points. advancedToR32 = array of exactly 32 codes. groupWinners = array of 12 codes (one per group).
_knockout_help: Fill each round as it happens. For every match give home, away, hs, as, and winner (the code that advanced — if decided on penalties, just put the team that went through as the winner). Goals here also count toward the goals tiebreaker.
